title: They Are Watching
overview: Two friends who run an online channel have embarked on the strange and unusual for years when they decide to search the deep underbelly of the dark web for something known as Dark Web Mystery Boxes. Soon they find themselves stalked by a group who run online torture rooms known online as Red Rooms.
